morning_brew: Alright, so the Red Sox actually pulled out a wicked win on Patriots' Day yesterday, beating the Tigers 8-6 at Yawkey Way! They finally got somethin' goin' with 12 hits, and Ceddanne Rafaela came through in the clutch with a two-run single in the seventh. Our starter, Gray, S, only lasted 2.2 innings, giving up 1 earned run, but the bullpen, despite Watson, R giving up 3 earned runs in 1.1 innings, managed to close it out. Now they gotta face the Yankees in the first of a three-game series, and with the Sox at 9-13 and the Yanks at 13-9, it's gonna be a tough one. Let's see if they can keep that momentum going, or if it was just a holiday fluke.

Meanwhile, the Celtics and Bruins are both gearing up for the postseason. Neither team played yesterday, but the playoff brackets are set for both the NBA and NHL. The C's are ready for their first-round matchups, and the B's are kicking off their Stanley Cup run against the Sabres tonight. This is where it really counts, folks. No more regular season nonsense, it's time to bring the intensity and show everyone what Boston hockey and basketball are all about. Anything less is just a waste of time.

And then you got the Patriots, always somethin' cookin' in the offseason, huh? Saw some talk from Schefter about A.J. Brown likely being traded to the Pats after June 1. Are you kiddin' me? If we actually land a talent like that, that'd be a wicked boost to the offense! But it's all speculation right now. Stephen A. Smith is even scratching his head about what the Eagles are doing. I'll believe it when I see him on the field in Foxborough, but it's good to hear some positive buzz for once.

trend_watch.trend: Hitting .324 with an .889 OPS this season.
trend_watch.dans_take: Yoshida's been a bright spot, hitting .324 this season. That's a solid bat in the lineup, we need more of that consistency.

trend_watch.trend: Gave up 3 earned runs in 1.1 innings pitched yesterday.
trend_watch.dans_take: What a disastah! Watson, R gave up 3 earned runs in just 1.1 innings yesterday. That's absolutely brutal from the bullpen, gotta tighten that up.

news_digest.headline: Red Sox play the Yankees in first of 3-game series
news_digest.dans_take: Alright, here we go, the Yankees coming to Yawkey Way. This is where you see what the Sox are made of.

news_digest.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Eastern Conference first-round takeaways
news_digest.dans_take: Playoffs are here for the C's, let's hope they come out strong. No more messing around.

news_digest.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
news_digest.dans_take: The playoffs are all set, time for the Celtics to show up when it matters most.

news_digest.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs 2026: Bracket, schedule, scores, news
news_digest.dans_take: The B's playoff bracket is out, no more excuses, gotta go out there and win.

news_digest.headline: Ceddanne Rafaela's tiebreaking two-run single helps Red Sox to 8-6 Patriots' Day win over Tigers
news_digest.dans_take: Rafaela stepping up when it counted on Patriots' Day, that's what we need more of.

news_digest.headline: 'It makes no sense!' Stephen A. has no idea what's going on with Eagles
news_digest.dans_take: Stephen A. is as confused as I am about this Eagles situation, but if it means Brown comes here, I'm all for it.

news_digest.headline: Schefter: A.J. Brown likely to be traded to the Patriots post-June 1
news_digest.dans_take: A.J. Brown to the Pats? I'll believe it when I see him in a uniform, but it'd be a wicked boost if it happens.
